description: The puma Cardiac Heart Rate Monitor Digital watch comes in a sleek design with a futuristic appearance that makes it perfect when navigating urban terrain. It is packed with features like time, heart rate monitor and lap counter to name a few. The heart rate monitor belt, that comes with this watch, needs to strapped around your chest. Case diameter: 30 mmCase thickness: 12 mmDial shape: SquareWarranty: 2 YearsPlastic case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfort Textured PU straps with a buckle clasp for comfort and style Black digital dial showing alarm-feature, chronograph, heart rate monitor belt, calories burned, dual-time-display, perpetual-calendar, timer, light, etc.Reset buttons Quartz movement of time displayAcrylic dial window for scratch protection enhancing durability
